properties.title: Dirt Bike Robbery Attempt on Child
properties.summary: Multiple suspects involved in attempted child abduction; one suspect apprehended by officer.

properties.title: White SUV Fleeing on Flowers Ave
properties.summary: Traffic stop turned into pursuit; suspect's vehicle was spike-stripped and apprehended

properties.title: Bloomfield Blaze Spreads to Adjacent House
properties.summary: 2nd alarm requested for large, 2.5 story frame house fire extending to adjacent property.

properties.title: Live Body Cam Feed Monitoring
properties.summary: Police were monitoring a live body camera feed while on scene for an overdose call, and received remote direction from a supervisor to manage operations.

properties.title: Memorial Balloon Release Causes Power Outage
properties.summary: PD responds to memorial balloon release event, balloons cause power outage in surrounding neighborhood

properties.title: WWE Fan Fest at PPG Paints
properties.summary: Caller reports 50 people in WWE wrestling gear at the scene, but police officer on scene confirms orderly gathering awaiting autographs

properties.title: Flooding on East Carson Street
properties.summary: Road flooding reported near Page Dairy Mart due to creek overflow; one lane of River Road also flooded with the other lane passable.

properties.title: Racial Slur Incident on Brownsville Road
properties.summary: Caller reported a disturbance with racial slurs; officers located and arrested individual with active warrant

properties.title: Fire at Dairy Queen on East Carson Street
properties.summary: Caller reports kitchen fire with structure smoke; police confirm fire extinguished by staff

properties.title: Fairland Street Hex Incident
properties.summary: Caller reports two women attempting to place a hex on him using Obi-Wan Kenobi as a conduit

properties.title: Taco Bell-Style Smoking at Moe's Downtown
properties.summary: Caller reports suspicious behavior by teens smoking weed in the restaurant, requesting police assistance to move them along

properties.title: Vehicle Crash in Cemetery, Carrick
properties.summary: Multiple-vehicle crash reported at a cemetery on Birmingham Ave; one driver injured, no fatalities confirmed

properties.title: Driver Safety Concern on Mt. Washington's Bailey Ave
properties.summary: Report of drivers failing to come to a complete stop at a stop sign, prompting concern from the caller

properties.title: Cane Fight at White Lily Baptist Church
properties.summary: Report of two elderly individuals engaging in a cane fight on the sidewalk outside the White Lily Baptist Church.

properties.title: Senile Man Attempts Vehicle Escape
properties.summary: Caller is concerned about an elderly man attempting to drive despite having an expired license and failing to respond to reason. Dispatch assistance requested.

properties.title: Attempted Robbery at Sunoco on Brownsville Road
properties.summary: Caller reports attempted robbery at Sunoco with a pink gun; suspect fled without taking anything

properties.title: Severe Thunderstorm Warning Issued for NE Allegheny County
properties.summary: SEVERE THUNDERSTORM WARNING ISSUED FOR NE ALLEGHENY COUNTY UNTIL 7:45 PM.

properties.title: Chicken Protest at Courtyard by Marriott
properties.summary: Anti-chicken usage protesters gathered outside Courtyard by Marriott, claiming discomfort for hotel guests; bike cop on scene advised them to disperse from sidewalk

properties.title: Suspicious Activity in Van at Freeport Road
properties.summary: Caller reports a suspicious individual filleting items in their van, prompting an investigation

properties.title: Woman Chanting Outside on Bates Street
properties.summary: Caller reports a woman chanting outside their residence since sunrise. No reported threats or injuries.
